message:
fix: deep audit fixes across discord, fcp-store, fcp-crypto

Discord connector:
- Add custom Debug impls for DiscordApiClient and DiscordConfig to
  redact bot_credential (was leaking via derive(Debug))
- Fix message content length check: .len() -> .chars().count() for
  correct Unicode character counting against 2000-char Discord limit

fcp-store:
- Fix integer underflow in MemoryObjectStore::delete(): replace bare
  fetch_sub with fetch_update + saturating_sub to prevent counter
  corruption on size accounting mismatches
- Fix integer division truncation in symbols_needed(): use div_ceil
  instead of / to avoid under-estimating repair symbols
- Fix potential panic in percentile_bps(): use saturating_sub(1)
  instead of len() - 1 for defensive safety

fcp-crypto:
- Fix HPKE AAD encode: Fcp2Aad::encode() now returns CryptoResult
  instead of silently returning empty vec on serialization failure
  via unwrap_or_default(). Propagates errors to seal/open callers.
  (582 crypto tests + 1060 conformance tests pass)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
